meaning: adj.抵押的,以债券作保证的,有担保的,存入保税仓库的
examples: They are a fully bonded and licensed company.
They all bonded while writing graffiti together.
The rats may have bonded more with the social robot because it displayed behaviors like communal exploring and playing.
Wessely runs Formax UK, which makes expensive stitch-bonded fiberglass and carbon fabrics for use in industry.
Now we have found our feet and bonded and gelled much better as a team.
